Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPMEDS1 ;DALOI/BNT -Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; PSPT^PSNAPIS 2531 ; PSJING^PSNAPIS 2531 ; ^PS(50.606 2514 ; Q ; RDMEDS(SOURCE,TARGET,LOCALID,SMRY) ; N MEDICATI,MEDID,MEDI,ERR,MED,MED0,LIST,NODEI,PTRS,VUID,CNT,I S (I,ERR,MEDI)=0 I '$G(SMRY) S SMRY="" I $G(LOCALID) S MEDID=LOCALID G LOCALP ;SKIP PARAM PROCESSING IF LOCAL N X F X="medicationId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S MEDID=+MEDICATI I +MEDID=0,+$P(MEDICATI,":",5)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Medication Identifier is required.","RDMEDS^DVPMEDS1") I (+MEDID'=0)!($P(MEDICATI,":",5)'=0) D G:ERR QUIT . S MEDID=$S(MEDID'=0:MEDID,$P(MEDICATI,":",5)'=0:$P(MEDICATI,":",5)) . I $O(^PSNDF(50.68,"AVUID",MEDID,I))'="" S I="",MEDID=$O(^PSNDF(50.68,"AVUID",MEDID,I)) Q . I $G(^PSNDF(50.68,MEDID,0))="" D . . I $O(^PSNDF(50.68,"AVUID",MEDID,I))="" D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","Medication not found for medicationId "_MEDID,"RDMEDS^DVPMEDS1") S ERR=1 Q I +MEDID=0,$P(MEDICATI,":",5)=0 D G:ERR QUIT . S MEDI=$O(^PSNDF(50.68,"B",MEDID,MEDI)) . I MEDI=0 D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","Medication not found for medicationId "_MEDID,"RDALRG^DVPALL1") S ERR=1 Q . S MEDID=MEDI ; LOCALP ; N NODE,MED0,MED,ARY,CNT S CNT=0,NODE=$NA(^PSNDF(50.68,MEDID)),MED0=$G(@NODE@(0)),MED("resourceType")="Medication" ; id S MED("id")=MEDID ; Code I $P($G(@NODE@("VUID")),U)'="" D . N VUID S VUID=$P($G(@NODE@("VUID")),U),CNT=CNT+1 . K ARY D FHIRMED^DVPXUTL(.ARY,VUID,"V") M MED("code")=ARY ;Status S MED("status")=$S($P($G(@NODE@(7)),U,3)="":"active",$P($G(@NODE@(7)),U,3)'="":"inactive") ;form I 'SMRY I $G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),0))'="" S:MED0'=0 MED("form")=$G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),0)) ;ingredients I 'SMRY D . K LIST N DRUG D PSJING^PSNAPIS(,MEDID,.LIST) . S (I,CNT)=0 F S I=$O(LIST(I)) Q:I="" D . . S CNT=CNT+1,PTRS=$G(@NODE@(2,I,0)),MED("ingredient",CNT,"text")=$P(LIST(I),U,2) . . S PTRS=$G(@NODE@(2,I,0)),MED("ingredient",CNT,"amount")=$P(LIST(I),U,3)_" "_$P(LIST(I),U,4) ;package I 'SMRY D . K LIST D PSPT^PSNAPIS(,MEDID,.LIST) . S (I,CNT)=0 F S I=$O(LIST(I)) Q:I="" D . . S CNT=CNT+1 S MED("package","container")=$P(LIST(I),U,4) . N UNIT I $P(MED0,U,3) D . . S (I,CNT)=0,UNIT=$P($G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),"NOUN",1,0)),U) ;S:UNIT="" UNIT=" no unit found" . . F S I=$O(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),"UNIT",I)) Q:+I=0 D . . . S CNT=CNT+1,MED("package","content",CNT,"text")=$P($G(^PS(50.606,$P(MED0,U,3),"UNIT",I,0)),U)_" "_UNIT ; ; Extensions I $P($G(@NODE@("VUID")),U)'="" D . N VUID S VUID=$P($G(@NODE@("VUID")),U),CNT=CNT+1 . N RX S RX=$$VUI2RXN^ETSRXN($P($G(@NODE@("VUID")),U),"","") . N IX,OVAL,NVAL S OVAL=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(^TMP("ETSRXN",$J,IX)) Q:IX="" D . . S CNT=CNT+1 . . S NVAL=$P($G(^TMP("ETSRXN",$J,IX,0)),U,2) . . I NVAL'=OVAL D . . . K ARY D FHIRMED^DVPXUTL(.ARY,$P($G(^TMP("ETSRXN",$J,IX,0)),U,2),"R","") . . . M MED("extension",CNT,"extension","coding")=ARY S MED("extension",CNT,"extension","url")="http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm",MED("extension",CNT,"extension","coding","tty")=$P(^TMP("ETSRXN",$J,IX,0),U,4) . . . S OVAL=NVAL N DVPNDC S DVPNDC=$O(^PSNDF(50.68,"ANDC",MEDID,0)),CNT=CNT+1 I +DVPNDC D . S MED("extension",CNT,"extension","coding","code")=$P(^PSNDF(50.67,DVPNDC,0),U,2),MED("extension",CNT,"extension","coding","system")="http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc" . S MED("extension",CNT,"extension","url")="http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc" ; I $G(LOCALID) K LOCALID M LOCALID=MED Q ;QUIT IF LOCAL M @TARGET@("results")=MED QUIT ; Q
